name: Project Horizon - Q1 2024 Delivery
description: Executive reporting dashboard for real-time project status visibility and milestone tracking

milestones.name: Requirements & Design
milestones.description: Completed project scope definition and architecture design

milestones.name: Core Development
milestones.description: Blazor server implementation and component development

workItems.title: API Integration - Data Service
workItems.description: Integrate JSON data provider with ASP.NET Core dependency injection and implement caching layer

workItems.title: Dashboard Layout Component
workItems.description: Build responsive dashboard grid layout with error handling and loading states for all screen resolutions

workItems.title: Work Item Summary Visualization
workItems.description: Implement three-column work item grouping component with status badges and description truncation

workItems.title: CSS Grid Styling & Responsiveness
workItems.description: Add comprehensive CSS for print optimization, screenshot clarity at 1024x768 and 1920x1080 resolutions

workItems.title: Milestone Timeline Visualization
workItems.description: Create horizontal milestone timeline component with Chart.js visualization and status color coding

workItems.title: Browser Compatibility Testing
workItems.description: Validate dashboard rendering and functionality in Chrome and Edge browsers at all target resolutions

workItems.title: Performance Optimization - Load Time
workItems.description: Reduce page load time to under 1 second and optimize data.json parsing to under 500ms
